description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with long, flowing hair and a dramatic, floor-length cloak that drapes behind her. She wears a revealing, fantasy-inspired outfit consisting of a bikini-style top and bottom, with gold trim and ornamental bands accentuating her arms, waist, and legs. The cloak is open at the front, exposing her midriff and legs, and features gold accents along the edges. Her footwear consists of high-heeled sandals with straps that wrap around her ankles. The figure's pose is elegant and slightly reserved, with one hand raised near her face and the other resting by her side. The overall appearance suggests a character from a fantasy or magical setting, with a focus on ornamental and dramatic fashion.
description: A stylized adult female in a fantasy-inspired, revealing outfit with a long, gold-trimmed cloak and high-heeled sandals. She stands elegantly with long hair and ornamental accessories.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the open cloak, bikini-style outfit, gold accents, and the figure's elegant pose with one hand near her face.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full length and flow of the cloak, as well as the long, voluminous hair covering the back.
description_view_2: Back-side view emphasizing the drape of the cloak and the hair, with a partial glimpse of the side accessories and footwear.
description_view_3: Front-side view showing the open cloak, the figure's posture, and the detailed gold trim on the outfit and accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: fantasy-style bikini top and bottom with a long, ornamental cloak and decorative bands
attribute_posture: standing upright with one hand near the face
attribute_hairstyle: very long, straight hair with side bangs
